title.en: BROADCAST COMMUNICATION (multiplex communication H04J; pictorial communication aspects of broadcast systems H04N)
Arrangements for broadcast or for distribution combined with broadcast
Arrangements for relaying broadcast information
Arrangements for replacing or switching information during the broadcast or the distribution
Arrangements for observation, testing or troubleshooting
Arrangements for broadcast or for distribution of identical information repeatedly
Arrangements for synchronising broadcast or distribution via plural systems
Arrangements for broadcast or distribution of identical information via plural systems
Arrangements for switching distribution systems
Arrangements for simultaneous broadcast of plural pieces of information
Arrangements for distribution where lower stations, e.g. receivers, interact with the broadcast
Arrangements for broadcast specially adapted for accumulation-type receivers
Arrangements for resource management
Arrangements characterised by circuits or components specially adapted for broadcast
Arrangements specially adapted for specific applications, e.g. for traffic information or for mobile receivers
Arrangements characterised by transmission systems for broadcast
Arrangements characterised by the broadcast information itself
Arrangements specially adapted for receiving broadcast information
Arrangements for receiving desired information automatically according to timetables
Arrangements characterised by circuits or components specially adapted for receiving
Arrangements for broadcast applications with a direct linking to broadcast information or broadcast space-time; Broadcast-related systems

Arrangements for generating broadcast information; Arrangements for generating broadcast-related information with a direct linking to broadcast information or to broadcast space-time; Arrangements for simultaneous generation of broadcast information and broadcast-related information
Arrangements for device control with a direct linkage to broadcast information or to broadcast space-time; Arrangements for control of broadcast-related services
Arrangements for updating broadcast information or broadcast-related information
Arrangements for recording or accumulating broadcast information or broadcast-related information
Arrangements for monitoring broadcast services or broadcast-related services
Arrangements for identifying or recognising characteristics with a direct linkage to broadcast information or to broadcast space-time, e.g. for identifying broadcast stations or for identifying users
Arrangements characterised by components specially adapted for monitoring, identification or recognition covered by groups H04H60/29-H04H60/54
Arrangements for services using the result of monitoring, identification or recognition covered by groups H04H60/29-H04H60/54
Systems specially adapted for using specific information, e.g. geographical or meteorological information
Arrangements characterised by transmission systems other than for broadcast, e.g. the Internet {(for broadcast H04H20/65)}
Aspects of broadcast communication
characterised by the type of broadcast system
characterised by the use of a return channel, e.g. for collecting users' opinions, for returning broadcast space/time information or for requesting data
characterised in that additional data relating to the broadcast data are available via a different channel than the broadcast channel
characterised by the use of watermarks
characterised in that the receiver comprises more than one tuner
characterised in that receivers can be addressed
characterised in that motion picture association of America [MPAA] ratings are used
characterised by the use of signatures
